title: PvP Pack Optimized
description: This Texturepack has many different features like low fire, low shield, small totem, no explosion effects and more in one pack
body:
### This Texturepack contains:
- low fire (also on the floor)
- low shield
- small totem and totem pop 
- no explosion effects 
- bow and crossbow charge color 
- ore outlines 
- bigger golden apples on the ground
  
So if you want to have a good PvP experience in one texturepack, it is perfect for you.

If you have any questions, feedback, or personal inquiries of any kind, feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/kX5NjxndyY) server. There, you can use the ticket system to contact me directly.
